name: Raw Corne-Rose
description:
Raw Aker Fassi:
1. For Skin Glow:


1 tablespoon of rose water


1 small teaspoon of Aker Fassi


Mix them together and apply to the face for 15-30 minutes. Then, wash off with Moroccan soap.You will notice your face becoming radiant, rosy, and as soft as silk.

2. Mask for Cleansing and Purifying the Skin:


2 tablespoons of rose water


1 small teaspoon of Aker Fassi


1 small teaspoon of Ghajar cleansing clay


Mix all ingredients and apply to the skin for 15 minutes. Then, rinse off with water and wash the skin with soap.

3. For Chapped Lips and Lightening the Color:


Vaseline


Aker Fassi


Mix them together and apply to the lips before going to bed. In the morning, you will find your lips soft and naturally rosy. (Highly recommended!)

4. To Give Hair a Gypsy Red Color:


10 tablespoons of henna


Juice of 2 lemons


1/4 teaspoon of Aker Fassi


Boiled water


Egg white


Corn oil


Mix henna with Aker Fassi and add boiling water until the mixture is between solid and liquid. Leave it for 30 minutes.Massage the scalp with corn oil to prevent hair dryness. Then, add the egg white and lemon juice to the henna mixture and blend well.Apply to the hair and leave for 2 hours. Rinse thoroughly and use conditioner to moisturize the hair without using shampoo.

5. Mask for Revitalizing Tired Skin:


1 small teaspoon of ground fenugreek


A small amount of Aker Fassi


1 egg


Mix all ingredients and apply to the skin until it dries. Then, wash with Moroccan soap. The result is amazing!

6. For Body Tanning (Bronze Look):


1 tablespoon of Vaseline


1 tablespoon of white vinegar


A very small amount of Aker Fassi


Mix the ingredients well and apply to the body. This mixture is excellent for the legs, especially for those with fuller legs, as it gives a slimmer appearance.

7. Natural Blush:


1 bottle of rose water


1 tablespoon of Aker Fassi


Add Aker Fassi to the rose water in the same bottle and apply to the cheeks. It will give you a beautiful, natural-looking blush.For a natural lip look, apply a bit of transparent gloss mixed with a tiny amount of Aker Fassi – perfect for daytime use.
You can also use the same mixture (rose water and Aker Fassi) for the body after a shower to leave the skin rosy and soft.

name: Facial Cleansing Sponge for Cleaning, 48 Pcs
description:
Wet Or Dry Using Round Makeup Sponge: please expand the compressed facial sponges with warm water before using. Wet using for facials cleasing, makeup removal, applying liquid cosmetics like BB cream, liquid foundation, makeup primer. After cleaning and dry, soft cosmetic sponges can be reused for powder cosmetics like repair powder, powder cake, blush powder.
Safe And Comfortable Facial Cleansing Sponges: these face sponges for cleansing are made of high quality sponge material, soft face cleaning sponge, comfortable to use, safe and gentle to skin. Used as Esthetician sponges, your clients will definitely love it's softness.
Portable And Easy To Storage: facial sponge pads are compressed for easier storage and carrying. You can soak it in water until it expands to full size when you need a soft sponges for facials.
Multi-use: disposable facial sponges are perfect for washing face, deep cleansing facial skin, removing makeup, dirt, oil, keep your skin clean and fresh. Used as compressed sponges facial, face cleansing sponge, makeup removing sponge.
Product Details: Package Included: 48pcs Facial Sponge Compressed, PVA Professional Makeup Removal Wash Round Face Sponge Spa Pads Exfoliating Cleansing
